title: Shoulder rolls
description: Roll shoulders backward in slow circles to release upper-back tension built up from keyboard time.
licenseAttribution: Curated devngn.ai wellness motion (placeholder asset, v1)

title: Neck half-circles
description: Slow ear-to-chest half-circles, one side then the other, to ease neck stiffness.
licenseAttribution: Curated devngn.ai wellness motion (placeholder asset, v1)

title: Wrist circles
description: Gentle circles in both directions to mobilize wrists after long typing sessions.
licenseAttribution: Curated devngn.ai wellness motion (placeholder asset, v1)

title: Posture reset
description: Stand tall, retract shoulder blades, tuck chin gently. Hold and breathe.
licenseAttribution: Curated devngn.ai wellness motion (placeholder asset, v1)

title: Box breathing 4-4-4-4
description: Inhale 4, hold 4, exhale 4, hold 4. Reset your nervous system between focus blocks.
licenseAttribution: Curated devngn.ai wellness motion (placeholder asset, v1)

steps.text: Sit tall and exhale fully to empty your lungs.
Inhale slowly through your nose.
Hold your breath, stay relaxed.
Exhale steadily through your mouth.
Hold empty before the next breath.
Repeat the cycle, keeping each phase even.

title: 4-7-8 breathing
description: Inhale 4, hold 7, exhale 8. Calming breath pattern for a quick reset.
licenseAttribution: Curated devngn.ai wellness motion (placeholder asset, v1)

steps.text: Rest the tip of your tongue behind your top teeth.
Inhale quietly through your nose.
Hold your breath.
Exhale fully through your mouth with a whoosh.
Repeat the cycle, letting your shoulders drop.

title: Seated hip opener
description: Cross ankle over opposite knee, hinge forward gently from the hips. Switch sides.
licenseAttribution: Curated devngn.ai wellness motion (placeholder asset, v1)

steps.text: Sit tall and cross your right ankle over your left knee.
Hinge forward from the hips until you feel a stretch.
Switch sides and repeat.

title: Ankle pumps
description: Point and flex feet alternately to keep circulation moving in the lower legs.
licenseAttribution: Curated devngn.ai wellness motion (placeholder asset, v1)

title: Standing back extension
description: Hands on hips, lean back gently to reverse the seated-flexion posture. Breathe through it.
licenseAttribution: Curated devngn.ai wellness motion (placeholder asset, v1)

title: Calf raises
description: Rise onto the balls of your feet, lower with control. A quick lower-body wake-up.
licenseAttribution: Curated devngn.ai wellness motion (placeholder asset, v1)

steps.text: Stand tall with feet hip-width apart.
Rise onto the balls of your feet, then lower with control.

title: Band pull-aparts
description: Hold the band at chest height, pull hands apart to engage the upper back. Slow and controlled.
licenseAttribution: Curated devngn.ai wellness motion (placeholder asset, v1)

steps.text: Hold the band at chest height with straight arms.
Pull your hands apart, squeezing your shoulder blades.
Return slowly, keeping tension on the band.

title: Cat-cow
description: On hands and knees, alternate arching and rounding the spine to mobilize the whole back.
licenseAttribution: Curated devngn.ai wellness motion (placeholder asset, v1)

steps.text: Start on hands and knees, wrists under shoulders.
Inhale, drop your belly and lift your gaze (cow).
Exhale, round your spine and tuck your chin (cat).
Flow between the two with your breath.

title: Dead bug
description: Lying on your back, alternate opposite arm/leg extensions while pressing low back into the floor.
licenseAttribution: Curated devngn.ai wellness motion (placeholder asset, v1)

steps.text: Lie on your back, arms up, knees bent over hips.
Press your low back into the floor and hold it there.
Extend opposite arm and leg, then return.

title: Glute bridge
description: Lying on your back, drive through your heels to lift your hips and wake up the posterior chain.
licenseAttribution: Curated devngn.ai wellness motion (placeholder asset, v1)

steps.text: Lie on your back, knees bent, feet flat and hip-width.
Drive through your heels to lift your hips into a line.
Lower with control and repeat.

title: Under-desk treadmill walk
description: A steady 30-minute walk at your desk. Keep working while you rack up easy cardio.
licenseAttribution: Curated devngn.ai wellness motion (placeholder asset, v1)

steps.text: Start the belt slow and find a comfortable, quiet pace.
Settle in and keep working at a walk you can sustain.
Ease the pace down for the last few minutes to cool off.

title: Under-desk stroll
description: A gentle 10-minute walk at your desk when a full session won't fit.
licenseAttribution: Curated devngn.ai wellness motion (placeholder asset, v1)

steps.text: Set the belt to an easy pace you barely notice.
Walk while you read or think, breathing easily.

title: Brisk treadmill walk
description: A 15-minute brisk walk to raise your heart rate and reset between meetings.
licenseAttribution: Curated devngn.ai wellness motion (placeholder asset, v1)

steps.text: Warm up at an easy pace.
Lift to a brisk walk where talking is a little harder.
Slow down and let your breathing settle.

title: Easy bike spin
description: A 15-minute low-impact spin to move blood without pounding your joints.
licenseAttribution: Curated devngn.ai wellness motion (placeholder asset, v1)

steps.text: Set a light resistance and spin easy to warm up.
Add a touch of resistance and hold a steady cadence.
Drop the resistance and spin out to cool down.

title: Standing desk reset
description: Raise your desk and reset your stance to undo a stretch of sitting.
licenseAttribution: Curated devngn.ai wellness motion (placeholder asset, v1)

steps.text: Raise your desk to standing height.
Stack your ears over shoulders over hips and stand tall.
Shift your weight side to side to stay loose.

title: Dumbbell rows
description: Hinge at the hips and row the weights to your ribs to counter desk-rounded shoulders.
licenseAttribution: Curated devngn.ai wellness motion (placeholder asset, v1)

steps.text: Hinge forward with a flat back, a weight in each hand.
Row the weights to your ribs, squeezing your back.
Lower under control between reps.

title: Goblet squats
description: Hold one weight at your chest and squat to wake up your legs and hips.
licenseAttribution: Curated devngn.ai wellness motion (placeholder asset, v1)

steps.text: Hold one weight against your chest with both hands.
Sit back and down, keeping your chest tall.
Drive through your heels to stand.

title: Dumbbell bench press
description: Press the weights from a bench to load your chest and shoulders. Warm up first.
licenseAttribution: Curated devngn.ai wellness motion (placeholder asset, v1)

steps.text: Lie back on the bench with a weight in each hand at chest level.
Press the weights up until your arms are straight.
Lower slowly to the start, keeping control.

title: Kettlebell swings
description: Hinge and snap your hips to swing the bell to chest height. Powerful full-body cardio.
licenseAttribution: Curated devngn.ai wellness motion (placeholder asset, v1)

steps.text: Stand over the bell, hinge back, and hike it behind you.
Snap your hips forward to float the bell to chest height.
Let it swing back down and flow into the next rep.

title: Dead hang
description: Hang from the bar to decompress your spine and open up tight shoulders.
licenseAttribution: Curated devngn.ai wellness motion (placeholder asset, v1)

steps.text: Grip the bar shoulder-width and let your body hang.
Relax your shoulders and breathe into the stretch.
Step down, rest, and repeat if it felt good.

title: Foam roll upper back
description: Roll slowly along your upper back to release tension from hours at the keyboard.
licenseAttribution: Curated devngn.ai wellness motion (placeholder asset, v1)

steps.text: Lie back with the roller across your upper back, hips down.
Roll slowly between your shoulder blades and mid-back.
Pause and breathe on any tight spot you find.

title: Jump rope intervals
description: Short bursts of skipping with brief rests for a quick, sweaty conditioning hit.
licenseAttribution: Curated devngn.ai wellness motion (placeholder asset, v1)

steps.text: Skip at an easy pace to find your rhythm.
Skip hard, then rest.
Finish with easy skips until your breathing settles.
